_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: No classic dashboard counterpart — packs are exposed via MCP (list_packs) and CLI in the classic generation. Loom mirrors MCP's projection.

shape_decl.rationale: PackLoom = {pack, version, display_name, description, types[], requires_packs[]}. 'pack' is the entity's logical primary key but already string-named; not renamed.

examples.name: default_packs
examples.note: Every initialised project has core/planning/release packs enabled.
